name: JFE Container Co.,Ltd.
summary: JFE Container Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells drums and high-pressure gas containers primarily in Japan and China. It offers general, inner paint, open, straight, special, zinc, antiseptic reinforced, and stainless-steel drum cans; pails; and drum rental services. The company also provides high-pressure gas containers, including aluminum and carbon FRP containers for natural gas and fuel cell vehicles, hydrogen transportation, and biogas and natural gas transportation; and oxygen and general composite containers. It serves chemical product, petroleum, paint, food, adhesive, cosmetic, plastic, and fine chemicals industries. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. JFE Container Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of JFE Steel Corporation.
